info.title: ejabberd Admin API
info.description: ejabberd is a robust XMPP server. The Admin API (mod_http_api) exposes 200+ commands via HTTP POST to /api/{command}. All commands accept and return JSON. Authentication is via Basic Auth or admin credentials.
